violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

(Cold salads ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The cutting boards on top of the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of debris: 1.retail food storage shelves 2.walk in cooler beverage shelves 3.exterior of the prep unit and deli display unit 4.hot chocolate dispenser/machine New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (retail ) area is in poor repair.Observed water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (throughout the establishment) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
